<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_skin_preset/styles.css" /><infobox theme="skin-preset-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{{name}}}'''{{#if: {{{name_modifier|}}} | <br/>{{#if: {{{name_modifier_color|}}} | <span style="color:#{{{name_modifier_color}}}; font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal;">({{{name_modifier}}})</span> | <span style="font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal;">({{{name_modifier}}})</span>}}}}</format>
    </title>
    <panel>
        <data source="modifier_count">
            <label>Modifiers</label>
            <format>{{{modifier_count}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="used_by_count">
            <label>Used By</label>
            <format>{{{used_by_count}}} skins</format>
        </data>
        <data source="show_name_in_stats">
            <label>Stats Visible</label>
            <format>{{{show_name_in_stats}}}</format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>SO Name</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
            <data source="name_modifier">
                <label>Modifier Slug</label>
                <format><code>{{{name_modifier}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
This template displays an UpgradePreset entry in a Portable Infobox.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox skin preset
|name = Preset SO name (e.g. "Coppertone")
|api_name = Same as name (it's the SO asset name)
|name_modifier = Display suffix slug (e.g. "coppertone")
|name_modifier_color = Hex color tag for the suffix
|show_name_in_stats = Yes | No
|modifier_count = Number of UpgradeProperty entries
|used_by_count = Number of skins referencing this preset
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
